reference: ON THE FOLLOWING DAY AS THE SUN WAS DECLINING THE VERY RARE PASSERS BY ON THE BOULEVARD DU MAINE PULLED OFF THEIR HATS TO AN OLD FASHIONED HEARSE ORNAMENTED WITH SKULLS CROSS BONES AND TEARS
text: on the following day as the sun was declining the very rare passers-by on the boulevard du main pulled off their hats to an old-fashioned hearse ornamented with skulls cross-bones and tiers
